pv_basket_cell_hippocampus.label: basket cell
pv_basket_cell_hippocampus.note: CL:0000118 'basket cell' covers perisomatic-targeting GABAergic interneurons forming axo-somatic synapses — the core morphological definition of PV basket cells. No hippocampus-specific PV basket cell term exists in CL. CL:4023018 'pvalb GABAergic interneuron' is a transcriptomic superclass (BROAD) also applicable. Potential CL contribution: hippocampal parvalbumin-positive basket cell.

cck_basket_cell_hippocampus.label: basket cell
cck_basket_cell_hippocampus.note: CL:0000118 'basket cell' covers the perisomatic morphology but does not capture CCK/CB1R marker identity or the regular-spiking firing pattern distinguishing CCK basket cells from PV basket cells. No CCK-specific basket cell term in CL. Potential CL contribution: hippocampal cholecystokinin-positive basket cell.

axo_axonic_cell_hippocampus.label: pvalb chandelier GABAergic interneuron
axo_axonic_cell_hippocampus.note: CL:4023036 definition matches precisely: cartridge boutons targeting exclusively the axon initial segment (AIS) of pyramidal cells, fast-spiking PV+ interneuron in the pallium. 'Axo-axonic cell' and 'chandelier cell' are synonymous terms. CL:4072046 (Homo sapiens taxon-restricted version) also exists.

bistratified_cell_hippocampus.label: bistratified cell
bistratified_cell_hippocampus.note: CL:0004247 'bistratified cell' is defined as 'a neuron that stratifies dendrites at two and only two locations' — a retinal amacrine/RGC-focused term not specific to hippocampal interneurons. The hippocampal bistratified interneuron (Pvalb/Sst/Tac1+, axon in SO and SR) has no dedicated CL term. Potential CL contribution: hippocampal bistratified interneuron.

olm_cell_ca1.note: No CL term for the O-LM (oriens-lacunosum moleculare) cell. CL:4023017 'sst GABAergic interneuron' is the nearest superclass (BROAD) but defined for cerebral cortex and does not capture the O-LM morphology (soma in stratum oriens, axon projecting to stratum lacunosum-moleculare) or Sst/Ndnf/Nkx2-1 marker combination. Potential CL contribution: hippocampal oriens-lacunosum moleculare interneuron.

hippocampo_septal_cell_ca1.label: sst chodl GABAergic interneuron
hippocampo_septal_cell_ca1.note: CL:4023121 describes the only known long-range projecting SST interneurons (Chodl+), which partially overlaps with the hippocampo-septal (HS) cell concept. However, HS cells are hippocampus-specific, project to the medial septum, and may not express Chodl. CL:4023025 'long-range projecting sst GABAergic cortical interneuron (Mmus)' is also RELATED but taxon-restricted to mouse cortex. Potential CL contribution: hippocampal somatostatin-positive long-range projecting interneuron.

neurogliaform_cell_hippocampus.label: neurogliaform cell
neurogliaform_cell_hippocampus.note: CL:0000693 definition matches well: small round soma, multiple short radiating dendrites, dense branched axonal mesh — consistent with spider-like morphology and volume GABA transmission described for hippocampal NGCs. The CL term is not region-restricted so applies to both hippocampal and cortical NGCs.

ivy_cell_hippocampus.note: No dedicated CL term for ivy cell. CL:4042013 'Lamp5 Lhx6 neuron' (MGE-derived, Lamp5+) is RELATED by marker overlap (Lamp5, Nos1, Npy) but is defined transcriptomically and not specific to ivy cell morphology or hippocampal location. CL:0000693 neurogliaform cell is RELATED by morphological similarity but ivy cells are distinguished by laminar position (SP vs SLM). Potential CL contribution: hippocampal ivy cell.

is_interneuron_hippocampus.label: VIP GABAergic interneuron
is_interneuron_hippocampus.note: CL:4023016 'VIP GABAergic interneuron' captures the VIP+ subset of IS cells (IS-2 and IS-3 subtypes) but not IS-1 cells (CR+/VIP-). The defining functional feature — selective targeting of other interneurons for disinhibition — is not encoded in any CL term. CL:1001569 'hippocampal interneuron' is too broad. Potential CL contribution: interneuron-specific interneuron (IS interneuron) of hippocampus.
